---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Command run

```bash
n8m <command> <args>
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| n8m version | `npx @lhi/n8m --version` |
| Node version | `node --version` |
| OS | e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| AI provider | e.g. openai / anthropic / gemini / ollama |
| AI model | e.g. gpt-4o / claude-sonnet-4-6 |

## Additional context

Paste relevant log output, workflow JSON snippets, or screenshots here.
